title: Siruvapuri Sri Balasubrahmanyam temple
tagline: Siruvapuri Sri Balasubrahmanyam temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Siruvapuri Sri Balasubrahmanyam temple, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Siruvapuri Sri Balasubrahmanyam temple is a Hindu temple in Thiruvallur district in Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Siruvapuri Sri Balasubrahmanyam temple is a Hindu temple in Thiruvallur district in Tamil Nadu. As per temple records, the temple structure was built over five centuries ago. It is primarily dedicated to Murugan. The temple also houses the murtis of Shiva and Parvati.

topPlaces.name: Arani, Chennai
topPlaces.description: Arani (Tamil: ஆரணி) is a residential area and suburb of Chennai, India, located on the banks of the Arani river.

topPlaces.description: Madhavaram is a village in Ponneri Taluk, Thiruvallur district in the state of Tamil Nadu in India.

topPlaces.name: Kavaraipettai
topPlaces.description: Kavaraipettai is a suburb in North Chennai, in the Tiruvallur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is about 30 miles (48 km) from Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Madhavaram Lake
topPlaces.description: Madhavaram Lake also known as Manali Aeri, or Mathur Aeri or Madhavaram Aeri, is a 150-acre lake in the Manali-Mathur-Madavaram area of Chennai, India.

topPlaces.description: Ponneri is a taluk of Tiruvallur district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Ponneri.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Siruvapuri Sri Balasubrahmanyam temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Siruvapuri Sri Balasubrahmanyam temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Siruvapuri Sri Balasubrahmanyam temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (37 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (31 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Siruvapuri Sri Balasubrahmanyam temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Siruvapuri Sri Balasubrahmanyam temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Siruvapuri Sri Balasubrahmanyam temple?
faq.a: Stays in Siruvapuri Sri Balasubrahmanyam temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Siruvapuri Sri Balasubrahmanyam temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Puduvoyal, Arani, Chennai, Madhavaram, Ponneri, Kavaraipettai, Madhavaram Lake.
